subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Average time complexity of Selection Sort:
explanation: Selection Sort average: O(n²).

subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Best case of Selection Sort:
explanation: Best case: O(n²).

subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Worst case of Selection Sort:
explanation: Worst case: O(n²).

subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Space complexity of Selection Sort:
explanation: Space: O(1).

subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Selection Sort is stable:
explanation: Not stable — equal elements maintain relative order may not be preserved.

subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Selection Sort is in-place:
explanation: In-place: only O(1) extra memory.
